_note: Per-lesson role-play scenario. Grounded in Pre-A1/024 dialogue + vocab. Learner plays Ben; computer plays Anna. Each NPC node offers 2-3 branches so the same lesson language can be reached different ways. Consumed by RP.Engine + RP.classifiers.local (see roleplay/).
title: 024 · Feed the Fish

routes.meaning: Ben says the fish are orange.

routes.hint: You can say “They are orange.” or “They are so pretty!”

partial.message: Tell Anna about the fish: “They are orange.”

off_topic.message: Anna has fish. Say “They are orange.”

npc.text: Yes! They are orange and pretty.

partial.message: The fish are orange. Say “They are orange!”

off_topic.message: Anna's fish are orange. Say “They are orange!”

routes.meaning: Ben asks where the fish live.
routes.hint: Ask a question: “Where do they live?”
You can ask “Where do they live?” or say “Three fish!”

partial.message: Ask Anna a question: “Where do they live?”

off_topic.message: Anna has three fish. Ask “Where do they live?”

learning_objective: Say what the fish can do

routes.meaning: Ben says the fish can swim.
routes.hint: Say what they do: “The fish can swim.”

routes.meaning: Ben talks about the tank and water.
routes.hint: You can say “The fish can swim.” or “They live in water.”

partial.message: What can the fish do? Say “The fish can swim.”

off_topic.message: The fish live in a tank. Say “The fish can swim.”

npc.text: It is time to feed them.

routes.hint: Ask about food: “What do fish eat?”

routes.meaning: Ben wants to help feed the fish.
routes.hint: You can ask “What do fish eat?” or say “Let us feed them!”

partial.message: Ask Anna about food: “What do fish eat?”

off_topic.message: It is time to feed the fish. Ask “What do fish eat?”

routes.meaning: Ben says the fish are happy.
routes.hint: Say how they feel: “The fish are happy!”
You can say “The fish are happy!” or “They like the food!”

partial.message: How do the fish feel? Say “The fish are happy!”

off_topic.message: The fish eat their food. Say “The fish are happy!”

npc.text: The fish are happy now. Thank you for your help!
